NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT DUMPLING KITCHEN LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DUMPLING KITCHEN LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE UNRUH ACT CLAIM, SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE NEGLIGENCE CLAIM, AND SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE PREMISES LIABILITY AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTION CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF HAS ADEQUATELY ALLEGED AN UNRUH ACT CLAIM. PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED LEAVE, IF SHE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE A CLAIM FOR NEGLIGENT HIRING, SUPERVISION OR TRAINING. A PREMISES LIABILITY CLAIM IS NOT APPLICABLE IN THE CIRCUMSTANCES ALLEGED. THE INTENTIONAL INFLICTION CLAIM FAILS BECAUSE THE ALLEGED MISCONDUCT IS NOT BEYOND ALL POSSIBLE BOUNDS OF DECENCY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/HEK)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR OCT-01-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAR-16-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-14-2012 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2012 Set For Trial On Oct-01-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. GREGORY H. KLINE OF MORGAN LEWIS, TEL. NO. 442-1468 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT DUMPLING KITCHEN LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Overruled as to the Unruh Act claim, sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the negligence claim, and sustained without leave to amend as to the premises liability and intentional infliction claims. Plaintiff has adequately alleged an Unruh Act claim. Plaintiff is granted leave, if she can do so in good faith, to allege a claim for negligent hiring, supervision or training. A premises liability claim is not applicable in the circumstances alleged. The intentional infliction claim fails because the alleged misconduct is not beyond all possible bounds of decency. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Not reported. =(302/HEK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DUMPLING KITCHEN LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF FIONE SU.
Appearances: Gregory H. Kline of Morgan Lewis (442.1468) for defendant and moving party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
